title: ceanothus sarcomphalus
intro: Ceanothus sarcomphalus, also known as California lilac, is a perennial shrub native to the Pacific coast of North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Ceanothus sarcomphalus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile addition to natural remedies.
